items.title: If Users Conceal the Recording Light on Smart Glasses, Meta Says It Will Disable the Camera
items.summary: Meta is listening to the criticism of its smart glasses and says it will disable the camera if the user attempts to conceal the blinking LED light that indicates the device is recording. [Read More]

items.title: AulGo Pocket Camera Hits Kickstarter – 4K Sony Sensor, 6-Axis EIS, 56g Body
items.summary: A new Hong Kong startup called TriLife has taken its AulGo pocket camera to Kickstarter, promising 4K capture from a Sony IMX486 sensor, 6-axis electronic stabilization, and five recording modes in a…

items.title: Clip Sweeper v2 Now Available – Free Mac App for Cleaning Video Project Drives
items.summary: Clip Sweeper v2 is a native Mac app for cleaning up video project drives. Built by Leland Dutcher, the app helps editors find, review, and reclaim unused media from editing projects without relying on…

items.title: 15-Year Photo Series Showcases American Flags From Around the Country
